title: apple粒a12可能快過i7 920，但快唔過7567u同2600

replies.msg:
測試環境:
- android: termux, debian 8
- pc: arch linux (xps13)
$ wget https://drop.wtako.net/file/6da65afc13061b45f7bb415b63d2e06b474921d0.mkv

$ time ffmpeg -y -i 6da65afc13061b45f7bb415b63d2e06b474921d0.mkv -vf 'scale=640:-2' out.mp4


8550u ~2.42ghz, ~37s for ffmpeg, tdp 15w (-0.09v)
[libx264 @ 0x560ea2f0a300] using cpu capabilities: MMX2 SSE2Fast SSSE3 SSE4.2 AVX FMA3 BMI2 AVX2


s835 (note8), 1.9ghz+2.36ghz, ~83.7s for ffmpeg
[libx264 @ 0x300008c010] using cpu capabilities: ARMv8 NEON

8550u power = 2.42*4 = 9.68ghz
ipc = 1000 / (9.68 * 37) = 2.792048247 = 100%

s835 power = 1.9ghz*4 + 2.36ghz*4 = 17.04ghz
ipc = 1000 / (17.04 * 83.7) = 0.701140335 = 25.11%


去到呢度，代表s835行ffmpeg同頻性能得8550u既1/4

assume geekbench 4 ARM's score is absolute,
fastest a12 = iphone xs = 11149
fastest s835 = 1+5t = 6629
a12 is 1.682x faster than s835

a12 power = 2.5*2 + 1.5*4 = 11ghz

s835 power = 1.9ghz*4 + 2.36ghz*4 = 17.04ghz

a12's IPC is 0.701140335*1.682*(17.04/11) = 1.82687086

kaby lake R's ipc = 2.792048247, which makes a12's ipc 65.4% of kaby lake R


當arm行geekbench可以直接對比分數，用a12同s835比，a12快過s836 1.68倍，同頻性能有8550u既2/3左右

7567u = kaby lake = same ipc as kaby lake R
7567u's power = 3.5ghz or 3.9ghz, let's do upper bound here
3.9ghz*2 = 7.8ghz
absolute power = 2.792048247 * 7.8 = 21.777976327

a12 absoute power = 1.82687086 * 11 = 20.09557946


7567u係kaby lake，ipc同kaby lake r一樣，乘返頻率*核心，a12數字都係大唔過7567u

a12 ipc 有初代i7左右水平(自己搵搵對比歷代i7 benchmark)，但快唔過sandy bridge，乘返i7 920既4核同base clock個數字大過i7 920，但i7 2600又勁太多，追唔上

that said，行到rpcs3先算

測試來源: 我自己
成個測試最on9既地方係ios冇得行ffmpeg cli，邊個有計既話通知我，我update下個test
測試改進: 只計big core
以a11去a12 個增長速率 你認為下一代a13 可以去到咩地步
